descFull: NVIDIA AI Blueprint for video search and summarization (VSS) is a GPU-accelerated reference architecture for building video analytics agents with real-time verified alerts, visual Q&A, and automated reporting. The VSS Blueprint uses vision language models (VLMs) such as NVIDIA Cosmos, LLMs such as NVIDIA Nemotron, RAG, and NVIDIA NIMs.
